title: Japanese Lasagna
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Italian cuisines. The Brazilian cheese adds a rich and creamy texture.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a pan, melt 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the Brazilian cheese and stir until melted.
Combine the dreamy cheese and the cheese mixture. Set aside.
To assemble the lasagna, spread a layer of the cheese mixture on the bottom of a baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese mixture.
Spread half of the remaining cheese mixture on top of the noodles.
Repeat the layers: noodles, cheese mixture, and finally a layer of noodles on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
